texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1) The above contract rates are based per night stays.
texts.text: The above contract rates are based per night stays.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2) Travel agent may sell our room rates above our net rates.
texts.text: Travel agent may sell our room rates above our net rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4) Check -in time is 12:00 noon and check out time 10:00 am .
texts.text: Check -in time is 12:00 noon and check out time 10:00 am .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ▪ Late check out until 1500Hrs is subject to 25% from the existing room/contract rate.
texts.text: Late check out until 1500Hrs is subject to 25% from the existing room/contract rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ▪ Late check out until 1700Hrs is subject to 50% from the existing room/contract rate.
texts.text: Late check out until 1700Hrs is subject to 50% from the existing room/contract rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ▪ Late Check out beyond/after 1700Hrs is subject to 100% from the existing room/contract rate.
texts.text: Late Check out beyond/after 1700Hrs is subject to 100% from the existing room/contract rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ▪ Early checks-in are subject to room availability and prior notification is required.
texts.text: Early checks-in are subject to room availability and prior notification is required.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ▪ Early checks-out (more than 24 hours) are subject to 1 day room rate penalty from the existing contract rate.
texts.text: Early checks-out (more than 24 hours) are subject to 1 day room rate penalty from the existing contract rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ERS 1.1 TERMS AND CONDITIONS FOR FIT & GIT RESERVATIONS
texts.text: ERS 1.1 TERMS AND CONDITIONS FOR FIT & GIT RESERVATIONS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. The Travel Company/Tour Agent is required to make a booking in writing by e-mail correspondence.
texts.text: The Travel Company/Tour Agent is required to make a booking in writing by e-mail correspondence.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. The Management will provide a written confirmation by return e-mail.
texts.text: The Management will provide a written confirmation by return e-mail.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c. The Travel Company/Tour Agent is required to make a cancellation or amendment in writing by email.
texts.text: The Travel Company/Tour Agent is required to make a cancellation or amendment in writing by email.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d. The Management will provide a written cancellation or amendment by return e-mail.
texts.text: The Management will provide a written cancellation or amendment by return e-mail.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e. The Travel Company/Tour Agent is required to provide all the relevant information pertaining the booking via e-mail for better accountability, transparency as well as reference purposes.
texts.text: The Travel Company/Tour Agent is required to provide all the relevant information pertaining the booking via e-mail for better accountability, transparency as well as reference purposes.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: f. The Travel Company/Tour Agent is also required to give the reservations desk proper and accurate check-in times/dates so as to avoid any inconveniences to both the guest and the management.
texts.text: The Travel Company/Tour Agent is also required to give the reservations desk proper and accurate check-in times/dates so as to avoid any inconveniences to both the guest and the management.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: g. Any cancellation made less than 3 days prior to arrival, will be charged 50% of the total booking and;
texts.text: Any cancellation made less than 3 days prior to arrival, will be charged 50% of the total booking and;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: i. No show will be charged 100% of total booking.
texts.text: No show will be charged 100% of total booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: h. Any cancellation made less than 7 days prior to arrival, will be charged 10% of the total booking.
texts.text: Any cancellation made less than 7 days prior to arrival, will be charged 10% of the total booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: i. The Pro-forma invoice will ONLY be sent upon a successful reservation confirmation by both the Travel Company/Tour Agent and reservation desk and immediately followed by an e-mail from the Travel Company/Tour Agent to support the booking. Ensure that all POPs and Booking Vouchers are properly scanned and STRICTLY sent to our email reservations@epashikinoresort.com for maximum accountability purposes.
texts.text: The Pro-forma invoice will ONLY be sent upon a successful reservation confirmation by both the Travel Company/Tour Agent and reservation desk and immediately followed by an e-mail from the Travel Company/Tour Agent to support the booking. Ensure that all POPs and Booking Vouchers are properly scanned and STRICTLY sent to our email reservations@epashikinoresort.com for maximum accountability purposes.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: j. A 50% deposit has to be settled at least 7 days prior to guest arrival date and full payment to be settled upon guest arrival date. Reservation is guaranteed ONLY upon payment of 50% deposit.
texts.text: A 50% deposit has to be settled at least 7 days prior to guest arrival date and full payment to be settled upon guest arrival date. Reservation is guaranteed ONLY upon payment of 50% deposit.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: k. In the event that the deposit has not been paid in full for any reason whatsoever prior to the guest arrival as stipulated in above clause, Epashikino Resort & Spa Ltd RESERVES THE RIGHT to cancel the booking prior to check-in and will not be held liable for any inconveniences/losses incurred by either the Travel Company/Tour Agent or the guest.
texts.text: In the event that the deposit has not been paid in full for any reason whatsoever prior to the guest arrival as stipulated in above clause, Epashikino Resort & Spa Ltd RESERVES THE RIGHT to cancel the booking prior to check-in and will not be held liable for any inconveniences/losses incurred by either the Travel Company/Tour Agent or the guest.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: l. In the case of unsettled invoices by the due date, it will incur a 10% interest/day of the total outstanding amount and Epashikino Resort & Spa Ltd reserves the right to refuse any placement booking.
texts.text: In the case of unsettled invoices by the due date, it will incur a 10% interest/day of the total outstanding amount and Epashikino Resort & Spa Ltd reserves the right to refuse any placement booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: m. All payments to be made by cash or bank transfer to:
texts.text: All payments to be made by cash or bank transfer to:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: NB : All the above contract rates are net inclusive of all government taxes, service charge and are non-commissionable and are subject to change due to prevailing economic considerations.
texts.text: NB : All the above contract rates are net inclusive of all government taxes, service charge and are non-commissionable and are subject to change due to prevailing economic considerations.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: n. This contract remains confidential between the undersigned and designated clientele, and SHALL NOT be disclosed to other third parties. Unauthorized disclosure of content will automatically terminate this agreement.
texts.text: This contract remains confidential between the undersigned and designated clientele, and SHALL NOT be disclosed to other third parties. Unauthorized disclosure of content will automatically terminate this agreement.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o. Any amendment to this agreement shall not be valid until agreed in writing by authorized representative of both Epashikino Resort & Spa Ltd and the designated Travel Company/Tour Agent.
texts.text: Any amendment to this agreement shall not be valid until agreed in writing by authorized representative of both Epashikino Resort & Spa Ltd and the designated Travel Company/Tour Agent.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: p. A valid and wellinformed booking voucher is required prior to guest's arrival or upon guest's check -in STRICTLY via email. Failure to provide a valid booking voucher before guest's departure will be automatically switched to normal published rack rates and payment will be on guest personal account.
texts.text: A valid and wellinformed booking voucher is required prior to guest's arrival or upon guest's check -in STRICTLY via email. Failure to provide a valid booking voucher before guest's departure will be automatically switched to normal published rack rates and payment will be on guest personal account.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: q. We strictly observe a room capacity policy:
texts.text: We strictly observe a room capacity policy:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ❖ Deluxe rooms can accommodate up to a maximum 2 adults (Baby cots are available upon special request).
texts.text: ❖ Deluxe rooms can accommodate up to a maximum 2 adults (Baby cots are available upon special request).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ❖ Twin rooms can accommodate up to a maximum of 2 adults.
texts.text: ❖ Twin rooms can accommodate up to a maximum of 2 adults.

texts.text: 1 st Child below 5yrs sharing with adult(s) -

texts.text: 2 nd Child below 5 years sharing with adult(s) -

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: s. Both parties agree to each carry adequate liability and other insurance protecting itself against any claims arising from any activities conducted in the retreat during the period of accommodation.
texts.text: Both parties agree to each carry adequate liability and other insurance protecting itself against any claims arising from any activities conducted in the retreat during the period of accommodation.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For the purposes of this Contract, 'Force Majeure' means an event which is beyond the reasonable control of a Party and which makes a Party's performance of its obligations under the Contract impossible or so impractical as to be considered impossible under the circumstances. The circumstances include but not limited to acts of God, nature, war, government regulations, disaster, strikes, civil disorder, curtailment of transportation facilities, or any other emergency making it illegal or impossible to provide the facilities contracted.
texts.text: For the purposes of this Contract, 'Force Majeure' means an event which is beyond the reasonable control of a Party and which makes a Party's performance of its obligations under the Contract impossible or so impractical as to be considered impossible under the circumstances. The circumstances include but not limited to acts of God, nature, war, government regulations, disaster, strikes, civil disorder, curtailment of transportation facilities, or any other emergency making it illegal or impossible to provide the facilities contracted.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The failure of a Party to fulfil any of its obligations under the contract shall not be considered to be a breach of, or default under, this Contract insofar as such inability arises from an event of Force Majeure, provided that the Party affected by such an event:
texts.text: The failure of a Party to fulfil any of its obligations under the contract shall not be considered to be a breach of, or default under, this Contract insofar as such inability arises from an event of Force Majeure, provided that the Party affected by such an event:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. has taken all reasonable precautions, due care and reasonable alternative measures in order to carry out the terms and conditions of this Contract, and;
texts.text: has taken all reasonable precautions, due care and reasonable alternative measures in order to carry out the terms and conditions of this Contract, and;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. has informed the other Party as soon as possible about the occurrence of such an event.
texts.text: has informed the other Party as soon as possible about the occurrence of such an event.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: t. This Agreement is valid from immediately until December 31 st  2024 . Any inquiry for contract extension must be submitted at least one month prior to expiration date. Epashikino Resort & Spa reserves all rights to terminate the agreement before expiration date based on our professional consideration.
texts.text: This Agreement is valid from immediately until December 31 st  2024 . Any inquiry for contract extension must be submitted at least one month prior to expiration date. Epashikino Resort & Spa reserves all rights to terminate the agreement before expiration date based on our professional consideration.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: u. The terms and conditions of this agreement may only be renegotiated and or waived with the written consent of the authorized representative of Epashikino Resort & Spa Ltd.
texts.text: The terms and conditions of this agreement may only be renegotiated and or waived with the written consent of the authorized representative of Epashikino Resort & Spa Ltd.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We thank you for your interest in Epashikino Resort & Spa. Please duly sign the below agreement for the agreed cooperation, meanwhile we look forward to a long-lasting, mutually beneficial relationship.
texts.text: We thank you for your interest in Epashikino Resort & Spa. Please duly sign the below agreement for the agreed cooperation, meanwhile we look forward to a long-lasting, mutually beneficial relationship.
